response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches on-screen lyrics for both 'Tokai Cider' and 'Sil Vous President'. I used these burnt-in lyrics as the primary source for transcription accuracy. Dialogue between songs and at the end was transcribed and translated manually, maintaining context about the 'becoming the wall' running joke. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, ensuring no early cutoffs and proper spacing during pauses.

subtitles.original: 小さいつぼみのぬくもり感じて
subtitles.english: Feeling the warmth of a small bud

subtitles.original: おおー！最高！神曲！
subtitles.english: Whoa! That was the best! A god-tier song!

subtitles.original: 神曲や... 神曲やな...
subtitles.english: A god-tier song... It really is a god-tier song...

subtitles.original: 本当に最高。
subtitles.english: Truly the best.

subtitles.original: これちまう！これちまうぞー！
subtitles.english: This is it! This is the one!

subtitles.original: よし、じゃあ次 Z だ。
subtitles.english: Alright, next is Z.

subtitles.original: Z？はい、歌いましょう。
subtitles.english: Z? Yes, let's sing it.
Number 13?
Yeah, 13.

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌いますか、これ。
subtitles.english: Shall we sing this together?

subtitles.original: 私踊ってあげる。懐かしいの。
subtitles.english: I'll dance for you. This is nostalgic.

subtitles.original: みんなで歌お！みんなで！
subtitles.english: Let's all sing! Everyone!

subtitles.original: みんなで歌いますか。
subtitles.english: Shall we all sing together?

subtitles.original: 私もマイクを持つか。
subtitles.english: Should I hold a mic too?

subtitles.original: 振り付け、夏祭り。
subtitles.english: The choreography is Natsumatsuri style.

subtitles.original: うちらはバックダンサーね。
subtitles.english: We'll be the back dancers.

subtitles.original: 二人のデュエット聞きたい。
subtitles.english: I want to hear your duet.

subtitles.original: ロマンスの不祥事 逃がさない
subtitles.english: I won't let a romance scandal escape

subtitles.original: 消してあげる
subtitles.english: I'll erase it for you

subtitles.original: 宣誓！私が大統領になったら
subtitles.english: Oath! If I become the president...

subtitles.original: 人の男にちょっかいかける女は 島流しにします！
subtitles.english: I'll exile any woman who meddles with other people's men!

subtitles.original: ヘソから電気を流します。
subtitles.english: I'll send electricity through their belly buttons.

subtitles.original: だ・だ・だ・大胆不敵 センセーショナル クローズアップ
subtitles.english: Da-da-da, audacious, sensational, close-up

subtitles.original: D, D, D, Don't cry やるぜ徹底的にリサーチ
subtitles.english: D, D, D, Don't cry, I'll do thorough research

subtitles.original: 大嫌い？ しょうがない？
subtitles.english: Hate it? Can't be helped?

subtitles.original: クズは病気ね バイバイ・バイ
subtitles.english: Trash is a disease, bye-bye-bye

subtitles.original: 権力！財産！地位名声！！
subtitles.english: Power! Wealth! Status and Fame!!

subtitles.original: なんにもないけど 裁きたいでしょ？
subtitles.english: You have nothing, but you want to judge, right?

subtitles.original: だ・だ・だ・大統領になったらね
subtitles.english: Da-da-da, if I become the president

subtitles.original: まずは君を捕まえるね
subtitles.english: First, I'll catch you

subtitles.original: 濡れたタオルで
subtitles.english: With a wet towel

subtitles.original: 洗いざらい吐かせるね
subtitles.english: I'll make you spill everything

subtitles.original: 誰ですかあの女（いやぁ〜）
subtitles.english: Who is that woman? (Nooo~)

subtitles.original: ダメですか
subtitles.english: Is it no good?

subtitles.original: そうですか（あちゃ〜）
subtitles.english: I see... (Oh boy...)

subtitles.original: ロマンス of 不祥事 逃がさない 消してあげる
subtitles.english: I won't let a romance scandal escape, I'll erase it

subtitles.original: しる・ヴ・ぷれぷれ プレジデント
subtitles.english: Sil-vous-pre-pre President

subtitles.original: 宣誓！私が大統領になったら
subtitles.english: Oath! If I become the president...

subtitles.original: 「ただの仕事の付き合いだよ！」って言う奴は 二度と働けなくしてやります
subtitles.english: Those who say "It's just for work!" will never work again!

subtitles.original: 宣誓！以下略！「いや向こうが強引でさ〜」
subtitles.english: Oath! Rest omitted! "No, they were just pushy~"

subtitles.original: っていう男の口には レジンを流し込んで固めてやります！
subtitles.english: In the mouths of men who say that, I'll pour resin and harden it!

subtitles.original: み・み・み・密着 まるでドン・ファン気取り スキャンダラス
subtitles.english: Mi-mi-mi, close contact, acting like a Don Juan, scandalous

subtitles.original: ま・ま・ま・末端価格 甲斐性なしのスクープね
subtitles.english: Ma-ma-ma, street price, a scoop for a deadbeat

subtitles.original: 愛はない？ 理由じゃない
subtitles.english: No love? That's not a reason

subtitles.original: 悪くないのね はいはいはい
subtitles.english: Not your fault, right? Yeah, yeah, yeah

subtitles.original: 軽薄！のうのう！いけしゃあしゃあ！！
subtitles.english: Frivolous! Carefree! Shameless!!

subtitles.original: なんにもないとか ありえないでしょ？
subtitles.english: Say you have nothing? That's impossible, right?

subtitles.original: だ・だ・だ・大統領になってもね
subtitles.english: Da-da-da, even if I become the president

subtitles.original: たぶん君は変わらないね
subtitles.english: You probably won't change

subtitles.original: しらっととぼけて
subtitles.english: Playing dumb with a straight face

subtitles.original: のらりくらりかわすのね
subtitles.english: Eluding me ever so casually

subtitles.original: デートですか こんばんは（うわぁ〜）
subtitles.english: Is it a date? Good evening (Whoa~)

subtitles.original: 本気ですか
subtitles.english: Are you serious?

subtitles.original: そうですか（ほちゃ〜）
subtitles.english: I see... (Oh boy...)

subtitles.original: 情熱とは不注意
subtitles.english: Passion is carelessness

subtitles.original: 微熱も消してしまいたい
subtitles.english: I want to erase even this slight fever

subtitles.original: だ・だ・だ・大統領になったらね
subtitles.english: Da-da-da, if I become the president

subtitles.original: マジで君を捕まえるね
subtitles.english: I'll catch you for real

subtitles.original: 濡れたタオルで
subtitles.english: With a wet towel

subtitles.original: 洗いざらい吐かせるね
subtitles.english: I'll make you spill everything

subtitles.original: どこですか 今あんた（おやぁ〜？）
subtitles.english: Where are you now? (Oh~?)

subtitles.original: 見っけちゃった バレちゃった（おらー！）
subtitles.english: Found you, you're caught (Hey!)

subtitles.original: 夜道にはご用心
subtitles.english: Be careful on the night roads

subtitles.original: さよなら代わりに銃声
subtitles.english: Instead of a goodbye, a gunshot

subtitles.original: しる・ヴ・ぷれぷれ プレジデント
subtitles.english: Sil-vous-pre-pre President

subtitles.original: 最高！最高！
subtitles.english: That was the best! The best!

subtitles.original: よかったですねー！
subtitles.english: That was great!

subtitles.original: そろそろ時間か？
subtitles.english: Is it about time?

subtitles.original: まつりもお腹空いてきた、こんだけ動いたら。
subtitles.english: Matsuri is getting hungry too, after moving this much.

subtitles.original: え、じゃあもうご飯食べに行きますか。
subtitles.english: Well then, shall we go eat?

subtitles.original: ご飯何食べに行こうかな。
subtitles.english: I wonder what we should go eat.

subtitles.original: 寿司？寿司食べたい！
subtitles.english: Sushi? I want to eat sushi!

subtitles.original: じゃ、見てくれたみんなもありがとう。
subtitles.english: Well, thanks to everyone who watched too.

subtitles.original: よし行くか。
subtitles.english: Alright, let's go.

subtitles.original: リリカ、壁にならなくていいの？
subtitles.english: Ririka, don't you need to become the wall?

subtitles.original: じゃあみんなで、ほら、一回壁になりますか。
subtitles.english: Then everyone, let's all become the wall for once.

subtitles.original: 壁の気持ちを知ってください、一回ね。
subtitles.english: Please know the feelings of the wall, just once.

subtitles.original: どうすか、居心地いいですよね、ここ。
subtitles.english: How is it? It's comfortable here, isn't it?

subtitles.original: いやなんか、すっごい... 落ち着くんだけど。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's actually... really calming.
